data.name: Vampire Legends 🦇
data.detailed_description:
Vampire slayers kill vampires. That’s what they’re trained to do, as soon as they’re old enough to hold a weapon. But happens if the vampire they’re fighting doesn’t want to fight? What if this vampire wants to show this slayer the truth about his race of creatures? How arm their bodies are. How good it feels to be held by them. And how wonderful it is to be fucked by them!

Key Features

• Visual Novel about sex adventures in fantasy kingdoms

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Girl fucked by Vampire Lord

• Full HD (1920x1080 pixels) resolution graphic

• Girl's and Monster's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: The vampire slayer has been fighting demonic creatures since she could first hold a weapon. But now she’s met her match! This creature of the night has other forms of entertainment in mind, and the sexy slayer suits all of his lusty wants and hungry needs.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
